Our Philosophy

Health is not something
you treat. It is something
you own.

The majority of chronic disease is preceded by measurable, correctable biological signals — often years before symptoms appear. Aeonix was designed to close that gap.

We leverage Swiss medical infrastructure and evidence-based biomarker science to transform passive patients into informed stewards of their own biology.

Clinical basis: Research in The Lancet and NEJM demonstrates that early biomarker identification reduces late-stage disease incidence by 40–60%.

🔬

Clinically validated panels

Every marker selected on peer-reviewed evidence. We test what matters.

📊

Personalised interpretation

Results contextualised against your demographics, lifestyle, and history.

🛡️

Data sovereignty

Full GDPR compliance, Swiss data residency, zero third-party sharing.

👨‍⚕️

Physician-led review

Every report reviewed by a qualified physician. Guidance, not just numbers.

Own Your Health Together

One decision
for both of you.

The greatest gift you can give the people who love you is knowing you are well.

The Experience

Effortless. Discreet.
Profound.

From booking to results, in 04 steps.

01

Choose your plan

Select from Prime Health (35 markers) to Elite (100+). One-time or annual subscription.

Available online. No GP referral required.
02

Private blood collection

Clinic visit or concierge home visit for Longevity Plus and Elite.

Home collection: 20 minutes, before your first meeting.
03

ISO-certified analysis

Processed in ISO 15189-accredited Swiss laboratories.

Swiss lab precision. GDPR-compliant throughout.
04

Results & physician consultation

Your report in 48 hours, with a physician consultation and personalised health roadmap.

Longitudinal dashboard tracks your biology year-over-year.

Aeonix vs Standard Check-Up

Why a standard check-up
is no longer enough.

A typical GP check-up tests 12–20 markers. Aeonix tests up to 100+.

Health Domain & Marker ✦ Aeonix (up to 100+ markers) Standard GP Check-Up
❤️ Cardiovascular Health
Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides✓✓
ApoB / ApoA1 — advanced lipid risk✓✗
Lipoprotein(a) — genetic CV risk✓✗
hsCRP — high-sensitivity inflammation✓✗
⚡ Metabolic Function
Fasting Glucose✓✓
HbA1c — 3-month glucose average✓Selective
Fasting Insulin + HOMA-IR✓✗
Full Liver & Kidney Panel✓Partial
⚖️ Hormonal & Endocrine
Full thyroid axis (TSH, Free T3, T4, Anti-TPO)✓TSH only
Cortisol — adrenal / stress axis✓✗
Testosterone, SHBG, DHEA-S✓✗
Oestradiol, Progesterone, FSH, LH✓✗
🌿 Nutritional & Micronutrient
Vitamin D, B12, Folate✓Selective
Zinc, Magnesium, Selenium, Omega-3✓✗
🔎 Oncology & Early Detection
PSA, CA-125, CEA, AFP✓✗
📋 Report & Follow-Up
Physician-reviewed annotated report✓Varies
Personalised 12-month health roadmap✓✗
Results within 48 hours✓✗

"You would give your child every advantage in the world.
Give yourself the same."

— The Aeonix Commitment

What We Screen

Every system. Every signal.
Nothing missed.

We examine your body as an integrated system — because no biomarker exists in isolation.

01
Cardiovascular

Advanced lipid fractionation, arterial inflammatory markers, cardiac stress assessment.

ApoB/ApoA1hsCRPLp(a)NT-proBNP
02
Hormonal & Endocrine

Full hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis mapping, adrenal function, thyroid cascade.

Full ThyroidCortisolSex HormonesIGF-1
03
Metabolic & Glycaemic

Insulin sensitivity modelling (HOMA-IR), hepatic and renal function, metabolic syndrome risk.

HOMA-IRHbA1cLiver PaneleGFR
04
Nutritional & Micronutrient

Subclinical deficiencies precede fatigue, cognitive decline, and immune dysfunction by months.

Vit DB12FerritinZn/Mg/Se
05
Inflammation & Immunity

Systemic low-grade inflammation is the shared pathophysiology of cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and dementia.

IL-6TNF-αESRNK Cells
06
Oncology & Early Detection

Validated serum oncology markers across key cancer types. Early detection remains the single most powerful survival variable.

PSACA-125CEACA 19-9

Health Insights

Evidence. Not opinion.

Clinical science explained clearly — by the Aeonix medical team.

Preventive Medicine
One Test or Annual Screening? Why Longitudinal Tracking Changes Everything
A single biomarker result is a snapshot. Annual tracking is a film. The clinical intelligence gained from longitudinal screening is qualitatively different — and clinically superior.
2025-01-15Read →
Cardiovascular Health
ApoB vs LDL: The Cholesterol Test Your Doctor Probably Isn't Ordering
LDL cholesterol tells an incomplete story. ApoB is the marker cardiologists now consider the gold standard for cardiovascular risk. Learn why Aeonix includes it — and your GP likely doesn't.
2025-01-15Read →
Bone & Musculoskeletal
Bone Health Before 50: The Silent Risk Most People Ignore Until It's Too Late
Osteoporosis is not a disease of old age. Bone density loss begins in the 30s. PTH, Vitamin D, P1NP and CTX — the markers Aeonix tests — can detect it decades early.
2025-01-15Read →
Mental & Adrenal Health
Burnout Has a Blood Test: What Stress Looks Like on a Lab Report
Burnout is not just a feeling. It has a measurable biological signature — cortisol dysregulation, depleted DHEA-S, elevated inflammatory markers. Aeonix measures all of it.
2025-01-15Read →
Oncology
Cancer Markers in Preventative Screening: What They Can — and Cannot — Tell You
Tumour markers like PSA, CA-125, and CEA are powerful tools used adjunctively. Understand what they mean — and what Aeonix's oncology panel is designed to detect.
2025-01-15Read →

Aeonix's corporate wellness programme gives Swiss employers a meaningful benefit that protects their most valuable asset — the health of their people. Bespoke pricing available.

The Executive's Guide to Preventative Health in Switzerland
Swiss executives lead demanding lives. Comprehensive health screening identifies the biological costs before they become career-threatening events. Aeonix is designed for this.

Gut & Immune Health
Your Gut Is Running Your Immune System. Here's What the Blood Can Tell You.
Gut dysbiosis drives systemic inflammation through bacterial translocation. The immune and inflammatory markers in Aeonix's panel — including IL-6, hsCRP, and lymphocyte subsets — tell part of this story.
2025-01-15Read →
Preventive Medicine
Inflammation: The Silent Driver of Heart Disease, Diabetes, and Dementia
Chronic low-grade inflammation is the shared root of the three leading causes of death in Switzerland. hsCRP and IL-6 measure it. Aeonix tests both.
2025-01-15Read →
Metabolic Health
Insulin Resistance: How to Be 'Normal' on Paper and Still Be at Risk
Fasting glucose and HbA1c can both be normal while insulin resistance silently progresses. HOMA-IR is the test that reveals the truth. Available in every Aeonix panel.

Swiss Healthcare
Why Your Krankenkasse Doesn't Cover the Tests That Matter Most
Swiss KVG insurance doesn't cover comprehensive preventative blood testing for healthy adults. Here's why — and what you can do about it.

Cardiovascular Health
Lp(a): The Genetic Risk Factor That Affects 1 in 5 People — And Is Almost Never Tested
Elevated Lipoprotein(a) doubles the risk of heart attack, is entirely genetic, and cannot be lowered by statins or diet. The only way to know your level is to test it.
2025-01-15Read →
Longevity Science

The world's most sophisticated preventative health protocols — from Silicon Valley to Swiss clinics — share a common framework. Here's what they test, and why.
2025-01-15Read →
Nutritional Health
The Omega-3 Index: The Most Underrated Marker in Preventative Medicine
The Omega-3 Index measures EPA+DHA in red blood cell membranes. It predicts cardiovascular mortality, cognitive decline, and inflammatory load. Aeonix includes it. Most check-ups don't.
2025-01-15Read →
Patient Education
How to Read Your Blood Test Results Like a Clinician
Reference ranges, trends, ratios — blood test results contain far more information than most people extract. A guide to understanding your panel from Aeonix.

Sleep & Recovery
Poor Sleep Has a Biology. Your Blood Test Reveals It.
Chronic sleep insufficiency elevates cortisol, IL-6, insulin resistance, and cardiovascular risk. The biological cost of poor sleep is measurable. Aeonix measures it.
2025-01-15Read →
Hormonal Health
Testosterone Decline Starts at 30: What Swiss Men Need to Know
Male testosterone declines by approximately 1% per year from age 30. Most men attribute the effects to 'getting older'. A blood test tells the real story.
2025-01-15Read →
Hormonal Health
Thyroid Health: Why TSH Alone Is Not the Full Picture
Testing only TSH misses subclinical thyroid dysfunction in millions of patients. Free T3, Free T4, and Anti-TPO together tell the complete story. Aeonix tests all three.
2025-01-15Read →
Nutritional Health

Over 60% of Swiss adults are vitamin D deficient in winter. Most don't know. Learn what the science says — and why your GP isn't testing it routinely.
